support.summary: No CEO action; deal frozen by PE-owner budget, not a CEO lever
support.detail: The decisive blocker is external: SGD Pharma is under a PAI Partners LBO and the PE owner has frozen all S2P budget for 2026, with champion Bihag Shah (Group CPO) deferring any approval attempt to September 2026 or FY27. This is a budget-timing freeze the buyer controls, not a pricing, product, presales, or exec-connect gap a CEO could unblock. At $150K and not forecasted, any relationship warming is VP/CRO-appropriate.
support.why_not_vp: Nothing here is CEO-only; a VP/CRO could run the light summer-break relationship touch. The real gate (PAI Partners approving 2027 budget) is outside Zycus influence and does not turn on a CEO peer call for a 150k unforecasted deal.

monitor.reason: No qualifying 14-day trigger: deal is small and unforecasted, no open deliverables owed by us (buyer-dependent), and all competitive evidence predates the window.
